name: BUPA Sync Orchestration
description: End-to-end BUPA Sync orchestration workflow. Selects active employee population, triggers SAP BUPA synchronization, extracts and analyzes errors via AI agent, routes fixes through approval, applies approved corrections, retries failed records, and sends a reconciliation report.

parameters.toolArguments: ={{ JSON.stringify({ infotype: '0000', status: '3', date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ table: '/SHCM/D_BP_SYNC', job_id: $json.job_id, date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) }) }}

parameters.message:
={{ 'Analyze these BUPA sync errors and propose fixes with confidence scores.

Context:
- Run ID: ' + $json.run_id + '
- Total employees: ' + ($json.total_employees || 0) + '
- Error count: ' + $json.error_count + '

Errors (SyncError format):
' + JSON.stringify($json.errors.slice(0, 50), null, 2) }}

parameters.subject: =BUPA Sync Fixes Require Approval - {{ $json.run_id }}
=BUPA Sync Fixes Approved - {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }}
parameters.message: =The BUPA Sync fix proposals for run {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }} have been APPROVED.\n\nApplying {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.high_confidence_count + $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.medium_confidence_count }} fixes now.

parameters.subject: =BUPA Sync Fixes REJECTED - {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }}
parameters.message: =The BUPA Sync fix proposals for run {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }} have been REJECTED.\n\nNo fixes will be applied. Manual intervention required.

parameters.subject: =BUPA Sync Approval TIMED OUT - {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }}
parameters.message: =The approval request for BUPA Sync fixes (run {{ $('Parse Agent Proposals').first().json.run_id }}) has TIMED OUT.\n\nPlease review and manually approve or reject the proposed fixes.

parameters.subject: =BUPA Sync Workflow ERROR - {{ $json.workflow.name }}

parameters.content:
## Step 1: Population Selection (M1)
Read active employees from PA0000 and vendor employees from LFB1.
Merge, deduplicate, and chunk into batches of 500.

## Step 2: BUPA Sync Execution (M2)
Schedule background sync job, poll for completion at 60s intervals.
Route based on job status: completed/failed/running.

## Step 3: Error Log Extraction (M3)
Read /SHCM/D_BP_SYNC and SLG1 logs.
Merge/deduplicate errors, invoke AI agent for analysis.

## Step 4: Approval Workflow (M4)
Parse proposals, route by confidence level.
Create Task Center approval, handle approved/rejected/timeout.

## Step 5: Fix Application & Retry (M5)
Apply approved fixes in batches of 100 via RFC.
Re-trigger sync for fixed records.

## Reconciliation Report
Generate structured report and email to consultant + HR admin.

## Error Handling
Global error trigger catches any unhandled failures.
Sends alert email to consultant and HR admin.
